error_coordinates_out_of_range: Error: Coordinates are out of range or incorrectly ordered (Lat before Lng required).
invalid_format: Invalid format. Please use 'lat,lng,lat,lng' or 'lat lng lat lng'.
new_version_available: There's a new version available! Click here to download it.
world_in_use: The selected world is currently in use
area_too_large: This area is very large and could exceed typical computing limits.
area_extreme: This area is extremely large and may be too big to generate successfully.
area_extensive: The area is quite extensive and may take significant time and resources.
select_area_prompt: Select an area on the map using the tools.
tooltip_generation_mode: Choose what to generate: buildings/roads with terrain, just objects, or terrain only
tooltip_fillground: Fill the ground below the surface
tooltip_satellite_colors: Determine building colors from satellite imagery instead of random presets. May not work correctly in some cases.
tooltip_city_boundaries: Detect urban areas and place smooth stone ground where cities are located.
tooltip_gsi_buildings: Use building data from Japan's Geospatial Information Authority (国土地理院). Provides much more building coverage for Japan than OSM alone. Tiles are cached locally for offline reuse.
tooltip_world_scale: Scale factor for the generated world (1.0 = real-world scale)
tooltip_custom_bbox: Manually enter coordinates (lat,lng,lat,lng) or use map selection
tooltip_map_theme: Visual style of the map picker
tooltip_save_path: Directory where new Minecraft Java worlds are created
tooltip_telemetry: Send anonymous crash data to help improve Arnis
telemetry_description: We'd like to collect anonymous usage data like crashes and performance to make Arnis more stable and faster. No personal data or world contents are collected.
world_name_whitespace_only: World name cannot be whitespace only
world_name_invalid_edges: World name cannot start/end with space or period
world_name_reserved: This name is reserved by the system
world_name_already_exists: A world with this name already exists
